appTitle: MEcfs-PAPERwork - BETA version (please report bugs on GitHub.)
appSubtitle: Paperwork for Myalgic Encephalomyelitis (ME/CFS) made easy. Secure in your browser - all data stays on your device.
feedbackIntro: Please do not include any patient or health data.
shareCopyInstructions: Copy the link below to share it.
shareCopiedDescription: The link has been copied to the clipboard.
formpackListDescription: Here you can see the currently available support offers. More are in progress. If you want to help, get in touch. All inputs are processed locally on your device and are optional.
formpackListEmpty: No support offers are available yet.
formpackListErrorFallback: Support offers could not be loaded right now.
formpackLoadError: This support offer could not be loaded right now.
formpackNotFound: This support offer was not found.
formpackUnsupported: This support offer uses a language that is not supported yet.
formpackInvalid: This support offer manifest is invalid.
formpackSchemaNotFound: The support offer schema file is missing.
formpackSchemaInvalid: The support offer schema file is invalid.
formpackSchemaUnavailable: The support offer schema could not be loaded.
formpackUiSchemaNotFound: The support offer UI schema file is missing.
formpackUiSchemaInvalid: The support offer UI schema file is invalid.
formpackUiSchemaUnavailable: The support offer UI schema could not be loaded.
formpackDocxErrorUnterminatedFor: DOCX template: A FOR loop is missing a matching END-FOR.
formpackDocxErrorIncompleteIf: DOCX template: An IF block is missing a matching END-IF.
formpackDocxErrorInvalidSyntax: DOCX template: The template syntax is invalid.
formpackDocxErrorInvalidCommand: DOCX template: A command is invalid or not properly closed.
profileSaveCheckbox: Save master data for future forms
profileDeleteConfirmPrompt: Do you want to delete previously saved master data now?
formpackFormNoActiveRecord: Select or create a draft to start entering data.
formpackRecordDeleteConfirm: Delete draft "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
formpackImportHint: Select a JSON export file to restore a draft.
formpackImportPasswordHint: Only needed when the export file was encrypted.
formpackImportEncryptedHint: This file is encrypted. Please enter the password.
formpackImportModeOverwriteHint: Select an active draft to enable overwrite.
formpackJsonExportEncryptionHint: When enabled, the file can only be imported with the same password.
formpackJsonExportPasswordRequired: Please enter a password for encrypted JSON export.
formpackJsonExportError: JSON export could not be created. Please try again.
jsonEncryptionUnsupported: Encryption is not supported in this browser.
formpackSnapshotsNoRecord: Select or create a draft to manage snapshots.
formpackSnapshotsClearAllConfirm: Delete all snapshots for this draft? This cannot be undone.
importInvalidJson: Invalid JSON. Please make sure the file is not corrupted and is in JSON format.
importInvalidJsonWithDetails: Invalid JSON (details: {{message}}). Please make sure the file is not corrupted and is in JSON format.
importUnknownFormpack: Unknown formpack. The file may come from a newer app version. Please update the app and try again.
importSchemaMismatch: The data does not match the current schema. The file may have been created with a different version. Try creating a new draft and transferring the data manually.
importInvalidPayload: The import data is incomplete or invalid. Please check that you selected the correct export file.
importFormpackMismatch: This JSON belongs to a different formpack. Please open the matching support offer and import the file there.
importInvalidRevisions: Snapshots in the JSON export are invalid. You can retry the import without snapshots by unchecking the "Import snapshots" option.
importUnsupportedLocale: The export uses an unsupported language. Re-export the data using a supported language (German or English).
importNoActiveRecord: Select an active draft before overwriting.
importOverwriteConfirm: The active draft will be overwritten. Do you want to continue?
importPasswordRequired: A password is required for this encrypted file.
importPasswordInvalid: The password is incorrect or the file is corrupted.
importEncryptedPayloadInvalid: The encrypted file format is invalid.
importStorageError: Import could not be saved. Please try again.
storageUnavailable: Local storage is not available in this browser.
storageLocked: Local data cannot be decrypted. Please reset all local data and start again.
storageError: Could not access local storage. Please try again.
updateFormpacksAvailable: Formpacks were updated in the background.
updateAppAvailablePassive: A new app version is available. It will apply after restarting the app.
diagnosticsDescription: Create a support bundle with technical metadata (no personal data) for troubleshooting.
storageHealthEncryptionNotEncrypted: Not active or legacy plaintext detected
storageHealthCookieSecurityHttps: HTTPS detected. The app writes the key cookie with Secure + SameSite=Strict in this context; browsers do not expose cookie attributes for direct verification.
storageHealthCookieSecurityNonHttps: No HTTPS context detected. The Secure attribute cannot be reliably applied here.
storageHealthGuidanceError: IndexedDB is not available. Data cannot be saved. This may happen in private/incognito mode or on some iOS browsers. Please use a regular browser mode.
storageHealthGuidanceWarning: Storage space is running low. Export and delete old drafts to free up space.
storageHealthGuidanceQuotaExceeded: Storage quota exceeded. Delete unused data or use a different browser.
resetAllBackupHint: Before resetting, export important drafts as JSON backup from the formpack detail page.
resetAllDescription: Completely resets the app. All drafts, snapshots, caches, and settings will be permanently deleted.
resetAllConfirm: Permanently delete all local data? Drafts, snapshots, caches, and settings will be lost. This cannot be undone.
storageQuotaWarning: Storage space is running low. Export and delete old drafts to free up space.
storageQuotaError: Storage limit reached. Export your data and delete unused drafts.

games.hubDescription: Small low-stimulation mini-games about daily life, pacing, and familiar moments. Everything runs locally in your browser.
games.hubIntro: ME Bingo and Spoon Manager are playable now. More quiet mini-games can slot into the same structure later.

meBingo.title: ME Bingo
meBingo.description: A calm 5x5 bingo board with all-too-familiar phrases, situations, and pacing moments.

spoonManager.title: Spoon Manager
spoonManager.description: A calm strategy mini-game about energy budgeting, small trade-offs, and careful pacing.

pemRunner.title: PEM Runner
pemRunner.description: A later mini-game about timing, limits, and the cost of doing too much at once.

meBingo.pageDescription: A compact bingo card full of familiar phrases, situations, and everyday classics.
meBingo.introTitle: A short round without time pressure
meBingo.introBody: Draw a card, mark the hits, and see how quickly one line comes together.
meBingo.instructions: 5x5 board, free center tile, no timer, no noise, fully offline.
meBingo.boardHint: Tap matching tiles. The free center tile always stays active.

liveRegion.bingo: Bingo detected. You can keep playing or draw a new card.
liveRegion.full-card: Full card detected. The result view was updated.

banner.bingoBody: The card stays open if you want to keep going for a full card.
banner.fullCardBody: There is barely room for any more painfully familiar hits.

result.summaryBingoMany: A lot of classics in a single round.
result.summaryFullCard: The whole board was uncomfortably complete.
result.shareHint: If you want to share it, a screenshot of this result card is enough.

spoonManager.pageDescription: A calm strategy mini-game about energy budgeting, everyday trade-offs, and the value of careful pacing.
spoonManager.currentTurnPrompt: Which option makes the most sense for this turn today?

intro.title: One day, six decisions
intro.body: You begin with a limited number of spoons and try to get through morning, midday, and evening as steadily as possible.
intro.help: No timer, no pressure, four options per turn. At least one of them always protects your room to breathe.

legend.title: Guide
legend.protective: Protective: creates room, reduces sensory load, or postpones something.
legend.demanding: Demanding: costs noticeable energy or still lands later.
legend.delayed: Later -1: this effect shows up in the next phase.

nur_waschen_umziehen.title: Wash up and get dressed
nur_waschen_umziehen.feedback: That was more manageable than the full version.

fruehstueck_machen.title: Make breakfast
fruehstueck_machen.feedback: Eating helps, but making it costs energy too.

nachrichten_checken.title: Check messages
nachrichten_checken.feedback: Even small inputs use up some energy.

kurz_whatsapp_antworten.title: Reply on WhatsApp quickly
kurz_whatsapp_antworten.feedback: Brief was good, but it still was not free.

anrufen_absagen.title: Call and cancel
anrufen_absagen.feedback: Cancelling saves more today than it costs.

20_min_ruhen.title: Rest for 20 minutes
20_min_ruhen.feedback: The pause gives the morning a little more room.

im_dunkeln_liegen.title: Lie in the dark
im_dunkeln_liegen.feedback: Less input gives some space back.

kleiner_einkauf.title: Do a small grocery run
kleiner_einkauf.feedback: Even small is not really small today.

essen_bestellen.title: Order food
essen_bestellen.feedback: Not cooking saves more than it costs.

kurzes_telefonat.title: Have a short phone call
kurzes_telefonat.feedback: Even short conversations can be expensive.

mail_beantworten.title: Answer an email
mail_beantworten.feedback: One small item off the list.

reizpause.title: Take a sensory break
reizpause.feedback: That noticeably took the pressure down.

paket_herunterholen.title: Go pick up the package
paket_herunterholen.feedback: Done quickly, but still a cost.

arzttermin_wahrnehmen_light.title: Attend a short doctor appointment
arzttermin_wahrnehmen_light.feedback: The appointment is done, but your system has not finished with it.

besuch_kurz_empfangen.title: Have a brief visitor over
besuch_kurz_empfangen.feedback: Short sounded manageable, but it still was not light.

kueche_noch_machen.title: Still do the kitchen
kueche_noch_machen.feedback: Closing the loop costs more than expected today.

alles_liegen_lassen.title: Leave it for today
alles_liegen_lassen.feedback: Something is allowed to stay undone today.

frueh_hinlegen.title: Go lie down early
frueh_hinlegen.feedback: That gives the day a softer exit.

licht_reduzieren_ruhen.title: Dim the lights and rest
licht_reduzieren_ruhen.feedback: Less sensory input was exactly right now.

noch_mails_checken.title: Check emails one more time
noch_mails_checken.feedback: Your brain keeps working, even if the day is almost over.

abendroutine_lang.title: Long evening routine
abendroutine_lang.feedback: Even in the evening, effort still adds up.

sofort_absagen_fuer_morgen.title: Cancel tomorrow now
sofort_absagen_fuer_morgen.feedback: Cancelling early can save a lot later.

events.paketbote: The package delivery rings exactly when things had just gone quiet.
events.wetterkippt: The weather turns. Unfortunately you feel it right away.
events.hilfe_verfuegbar: Someone can actually take something off your plate today.
events.essen_ist_schon_da: One less problem: food is already sorted.
events.ungeplanter_anruf: Unexpected communication costs more than expected right now.
events.termin_entfaellt: An appointment gets cancelled. That creates some room.
events.etwas_dauert_laenger: One small step takes longer than hoped.
events.kurze_ruhemoeglichkeit: A real rest window unexpectedly opens up.
events.nachricht_muss_nicht_sofort_beantwortet_: Not everything is urgent today. That helps mentally.
events.reize_haengen_nach: The day is already lingering in your system.
events.hilfe_fuer_haushalt: Someone takes a small household task off your hands.
events.arznei_abholen_muss_warten: You can push one thing to tomorrow.
events.licht_und_geraeusch_werden_zu_viel: Light and noise get more expensive toward evening.
events.abend_ist_ruhiger_als_gedacht: The evening turns out calmer than expected.
events.spontane_nachfrage_von_aussen: One more small outside request comes in.
events.etwas_ist_schon_erledigt: Something gets handled on its own.
events.appetit_ist_niedrig: Even sorting out food feels bigger than it should today.
events.ruhe_greift: The pause helps more than you expected.
events.abendliches_umplanen: With a bit of replanning, the evening stays manageable.

system.phaseOverload: That was a bit too much in one phase.
system.pendingPhaseDeltaNegative: An earlier effort is still catching up with you.
system.pendingPhaseDeltaPositive: An earlier relief is still helping a bit.
system.noPacingBeforeEvening: Without a pause, the room to maneuver shrinks.
system.socialChain: Too many outward-facing tasks still cost one more bit of energy by the end.

startFlavors.lowReserve: The day starts with very little reserve.
startFlavors.slowStart: You notice early on: today needs a slower start.
startFlavors.dayForWeighing: Today is a day for weighing trade-offs.
startFlavors.notAnEasyDay: This is not one of the easier days.
startFlavors.littleBuffer: You have a little buffer, but not much.
startFlavors.fragileEnergy: The energy is there, but it is fragile.
startFlavors.notEverythingAtOnce: Better not do everything at once today.
startFlavors.tightBudget: It feels like a tight budget.
startFlavors.smartPacingCouldHelp: Smart pacing could save a lot today.
startFlavors.middlingDay: A middling day with some uncertainty.
startFlavors.notEmptyButFarFromFit: You are not empty, but very far from well.
startFlavors.tacticsOverTempo: Today calls for tactics more than tempo.
startFlavors.okayButNotRobust: The start is okay, but not robust.
startFlavors.smallThingsTurnBig: One of those days when small things can turn big.

morning.alreadyTooLoud: The morning is already louder than needed.
morning.energyOnlyPartlyThere: The day is here. The energy only partly is.
morning.earlyDecisionsMatter: Today it gets clear early how tight this will be.
morning.smallThingsRelevant: Even small things already feel relevant.
morning.needsClearChoice: The morning needs a clear choice.
morning.easyToOverdo: You could overdo it easily today.
morning.prioritiesImmediately: The morning asks for priorities right away.

midday.showsWhatIsLeft: Now you see what is still left.
midday.dayOftenTipsNow: This is often where the day starts to tip.
midday.someRoomStill: There is still some room, but not much.
midday.feelItLater: You will feel whatever comes next later.
midday.reserveNotFresh: The reserve no longer feels fresh.
midday.smallChoicesDouble: At midday, small choices often count double.
midday.smartNotBig: This calls for smart, not big, choices.
midday.restOfDayDependsHere: The rest of the day hangs on this stretch.

evening.smallDecisionsNow: The evening now hangs on small decisions.
evening.littleBufferLeft: There is not much buffer left.
evening.stabilityOverProductivity: This is about stability more than productivity now.
evening.onlyIfTrulyNeeded: If something still has to happen today, it should truly matter.
evening.almostDoneNotYet: The day is almost done, but not over yet.
evening.eveningAffectsTomorrow: The evening often decides something about tomorrow too.
evening.everySkippedExtraLoop: Every extra loop you avoid is worth it now.
evening.roomGotTighter: The room to maneuver has narrowed.
evening.reliefOverAmbition: Relief matters more than ambition here.
evening.unspectacularIsFine: The final phase is allowed to stay uneventful.

stable.lessWasMore: Well chosen. Today, less really was more.
stable.surprisinglyStable: You made it through the day surprisingly steadily.
stable.keptReserves: You managed to keep some reserve.

narrow.tightButOkay: That was tight, but still okay.
narrow.notMuchMore: It would not have taken much more.
narrow.tightPacingCounts: Tight pacing still counts as pacing.
narrow.cautionWasNotOverdoingIt: Today, caution was not overdoing it.
narrow.doneWithoutBuffer: The day is done, but without a buffer.
narrow.gotThroughBarely: You still got through it, just barely.

crash.oneSpoonTooMany: That was probably one spoon too many.
crash.smallThingsAddedUp: Too many small things added up.
crash.reserveWentFaster: The reserve went faster than expected today.
crash.betweenNeededAndTooMuch: Somewhere between necessary and too much, it tipped.
crash.lessRoomThanHoped: There was less room than you hoped.
crash.lessWouldHaveProtected: Today, less probably would have protected more.
crash.sumNotSingleThing: It was not one thing. It was the sum.
